title: Only include container SizeRootFs when requested
body:
* API always returns value, so we remove it if not asked for

Fixes #1876

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@Edward5hen PTAL

Good chance https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1893 is going to cause a conflict.

API always returns it? Eeesh

@baude @jwhonce We probably want to fix that, container rootfs size calculation is VERY expensive
Rootless tests should be fixed on master, so cirrus should pass now
